notableEvents.label: James Wood grand slam
notableEvents.detail: James Wood hits an inside-the-park grand slam (13) on a fly ball to left-center field. Jorbit Vivas scores. Drew Millas scores. Nasim Nuñez scores.

notableEvents.label: James Wood inside-the-park HR
notableEvents.detail: James Wood hits an inside-the-park grand slam (13) on a fly ball to left-center field. Jorbit Vivas scores. Drew Millas scores. Nasim Nuñez scores.

notableEvents.label: Passed ball run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Passed ball by catcher Luis Torrens. CJ Abrams scores. Daylen Lile to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: CJ Abrams reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Bo Bichette. James Wood scores. José Tena scores. CJ Abrams to 2nd. Missed catch error by catcher Luis Torrens, assist to shortstop Bo Bichette.

notableEvents.label: Nick Morabito plunked
notableEvents.detail: Nick Morabito hit by pitch. Mark Vientos to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: José Tena reaches on a fielder's choice. James Wood to 3rd. José Tena to 2nd. James Wood advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by second baseman Marcus Semien.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: CJ Abrams reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Bo Bichette. James Wood scores. José Tena scores. CJ Abrams to 2nd. Missed catch error by catcher Luis Torrens, assist to shortstop Bo Bichette.

notableEvents.label: Bo Bichette GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bo Bichette grounds into a double play, second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr. Carson Benge out at 2nd. Bo Bichette out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: A.J. Ewing pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: A.J. Ewing called out on strikes.
